title: RBSE Rajasthan Board 12th Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: RBSE Rajasthan Board 12th Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Board of Secondary Education Rajasthan Result 2026 to be released for Class 12th annual examination on the official website - rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in on 31-03-2026 at 10 am. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the RBSE 12th result.

content.text: Board of Secondary Education Rajasthan has announced that the RBSE Rajasthan Board 12th Result 2026 for the annual Class 12 examinations will be released tomorrow at 10 am. The Class 12 results for Science, Commerce and Arts streams will be made available online for the 2025-26 academic session. RBSE Rajasthan Board Result 2026 has been scheduled to be released online on the official website - rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in.

Students will be able to check and download their Class 12 marksheet by visiting the RBSE result portal, entering their roll number and other required details printed on the admit card. After accessing the online scorecard, they should carefully verify their name, roll number, subjects, theory and practical marks, total marks, percentage and division and contact their school or the board in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: RBSE Rajasthan Board 12th Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: RBSE is set to publish the Rajasthan Board 12th Result 2026 for all streams in one go, allowing lakhs of students to check their performance and plan for higher education admissions. The results will be hosted on the official board website and linked result pages.

sections.heading: RBSE Rajasthan Board 12th Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: RBSE will activate the Class 12th result link on its official website so students can directly access their Rajasthan Board 12th result using their roll number. You can use the table below to reach the correct portal as soon as the result is live.

links.label: RBSE Official Website – All Results and Notifications

sections.heading: How to Download RBSE Rajasthan Board 12th Result 2026

content.text: Use the following steps to check and download your RBSE 12th Result 2026 once it is released:

items: Visit the official RBSE website: Click Here.
On the homepage, look for the link titled “Rajasthan Board 12th Result 2026” or “Senior Secondary Examination 2026 Result” for Science/Commerce/Arts.
Click on the relevant Class 12 result link.
On the result page, enter your Roll Number as given on your admit card (and any additional details if asked).
Click on Submit / View Result to display your online marksheet.
Check your personal details, subject wise marks, total marks, percentage and result status, then download or print the marksheet for use in college admissions and documentation.
